description: Oh My Pi (oh-my-pi) — AI coding agent, TypeScript/Bun + Rust

agent_file.note: OMP walks ancestor directories from cwd looking for AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md. ~/.omp/agent/AGENTS.md is loaded as a user-level context file. Current AGENTS.md is a symlink to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md — this works.

rules.note: OMP has native rules support with globs and alwaysApply frontmatter — same concept as Claude Code rules. Also reads ~/.cursor/rules/, ~/.codeium/windsurf/memories/, .clinerules. Rules dir must exist and be non-empty to be loaded.

skills.note: Same SKILL.md format as Claude Code and OpenCode. Accessible via skill://<name> internal URLs. enableSkillCommands: true adds /skill:<name> slash command. Directory must exist and be non-empty.

commands.note: OMP also reads ~/.claude/commands/ natively — meaning the existing Claude Code commands symlink may already surface these. Filename becomes command name. $ARGUMENTS substitution supported.

custom_tools.native_name: config.yml tools: section (shell) OR tools/<name>/index.ts (TS module)
custom_tools.note: Scratchpad is already registered in config.yml tools section in correct format. TS module format uses CustomToolFactory with full CustomToolAPI (exec, ui, typebox, streaming, lifecycle hooks).

hooks.native_name: Extensions (superset of hooks) — TS modules at extensions/ directory
hooks.note: HookAPI via @oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent/hooks. Extensions are the preferred mechanism — superset of hooks, also supports registerTool, registerCommand, registerShortcut, setModel.

mcp_servers.note: Same mcpServers key format as Claude Desktop. Supports type: stdio, sse, http. disabledServers array at top level also recognized. OMP also reads Claude Desktop config format.
mcp_servers.verify: python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.omp/agent/mcp.json'))); exit(0 if d.get('mcpServers') else 1)"

subagents.note: OMP reads ~/.claude/agents/ natively — existing Claude Code agents symlink may already work. Frontmatter: name, description, systemPrompt (required), tools, spawns, model, thinkingLevel. Bundled: explore, plan, designer, reviewer, task, quick_task.

plugins.native_name: npm packages (omp plugin install) OR TS extension modules
plugins.note: omp plugin install/uninstall/list manages npm-based plugins. Extensions (TS modules) are the programmatic superset. Plugin package.json must have 'omp' section.
